title_pl: Plan D pilot — 4 podstawowe świadki EDL
title_en: Plan D pilot — 4 trivial EDL atom witnesses
paper_quote: Sheffer companions §3.1 — per-primitive completeness for EDL is paper-open
informal_en: D1 .one, D2 .var 0, D3 .e_const, D4 .edl (.var 0) .e_const for exp via edl(x, e).
lean_target_signature: edl_witness_{one, var, e_const, exp} — four ∃ t, ∀ env, ... existentials
notes: SEALED 2026-05-08 by Aristotle, ~28 min. All 4 trivial atoms cracked: .one (rfl), .var 0 (rfl), .e_const (simp), .edl (.var 0) .e_const (simp + linarith for log e = 1 ≠ 0). Validates the Plan D delegation pipeline; harder atoms (log x, neg, etc.) are 085 which is still in progress.
